violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Walk-In Freezer, door covered with plastic tarps to hold in cold air. Not able to inspect at time of inspection due to tarps.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Many pieces of large, clean in place equipment in need of more thorough cleanings. Collecting buildup of powdered sugar/flour type dusting. Several pieces of equipment look like they are no longer operable and being stored alongside working equipment.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Lids covering the powders and lard/margarine containers (on wheels) in need of more frequent cleanings.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Floors are worn and not easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles show signs of water damage.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
